author: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon
book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

title: Canon V.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Concerning bishops or clergymen who go about from city to city, it is decreed that the canons enacted by the Holy Fathers shall still retain their force.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Those who go from city to city shall be subject to the canon law on the subject.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Clerical adventurers and brief pastorates are not the peculiar characteristics of any one century.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: It is supposed by Hefele that the bishops were thinking of the case of Bassian, who, in the eleventh session (Oct.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: 29), pleaded that he had been violently ejected from the see of Ephesus.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Stephen the actual bishop, answered that Bassian had not been “ordained” for that see, but had invaded it and been justly expelled.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Bassian rejoined that his original consecration for the see of Evasa had been forcible even to brutality; that he had never even visited Evasa, that therefore his appointment to Ephesus was not a translation.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: Ultimately, the Council cut the knot by ordering that a new bishop should be elected, Basalan and Stephen retaining the episcopal title and receiving allowances from the revenues of the see (Mansi, vii.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: This canon is found in the Corpus Juris Canonici, Gratian’s Decretum, Pars II., Causa VII., Quæst.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
